video:video.video:title: Computer Technology & Networking Company in NJ from JMOR Connection
video:video.video:description: NJ Computer technology company for IT business consulting, computer and network support. We listen to our clients, understand their challenges and provide solutions that make business more efficient.

video:video.video:title: Artificial Intelligence with our Guest Paul Claxton and Where is it all going with Robotics
video:video.video:description: Learn where Robotics is going in manufacturing and how it is starting to rely heavily on Artificial Intelligence.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Tech Talk wiht Dr. Granger and The Inside Story of COVID
video:video.video:description: Learn from Dr. James Granger the inside story about the real COVID Truth and our current pandemic.

video:video.video:title: Apple and Tesla at War Again and Joel Holc
video:video.video:description: Learn about the latest between Apple and Tesla and meet Joel Holc the author of an amazing book The Egg Shell Effect

video:video.video:title: JMOR Tech Talk Show
video:video.video:description: Meet the First Person to ever talk on a cell phone Mr. Martin Cooper. Who did he make that first call to.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Tech Talk Show Talks with Francis Kremer
video:video.video:description: Where is China going with their business world and their technology. Did you know they will pay about ten times more for someone to come from outside of China to do the same job someone would inside China fromanother Country.

video:video.video:title: Turning Waste into something useful
video:video.video:description: Will talk about devices that gain energy from your body's sweat and more.

video:video.video:title: You don't own social media
video:video.video:description: One does not own social media, learn before its too late and will talk to someone who helps those with disabilities be able to water ski.

video:video.video:title: Why is Pillow Guys getting sued?
video:video.video:description: What happened with the pillow guy and catch my great guest John Hart the author of The Unwilling.

video:video.video:title: How to Networking and will you want the Nike Hands Free Shoe
video:video.video:description: In this episode will talk about the new Nike Hands Free Show and much more including a great interview from Robin J. Elliot on how to network.

video:video.video:title: Will Everyone Own Apple VR Headsets and priceless fish
video:video.video:description: In this episode we take a look at the proposed apple virtual headset and fish that have a nice price tag. Also we talk about coivd and innovations that are affecting humans.

video:video.video:title: How Virtual Reality and Haptic Technology will Change Us
video:video.video:description: Haptic technology is going to change the way we interact and get feedback thus creating a real life like experience when we are in virtual worlds.

video:video.video:title: Using a secure app to stay off the Radar and Tino Go from Baru Furniture
video:video.video:description: Learn how to text securely and about how Tino Go took a frustration and turned it into a business that helps many local businesses around the world.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Tech Talk Show BoAT (Blockchain of AI Things) Interview Karl J. Weaver
video:video.video:description: Find out what BoAT means int the Block Chain of AI Things and what this all mean for everyone.

video:video.video:title: BOSCI SHP88PZ55N01 Dish Washer Review
video:video.video:description: Introducing a dishwasher that is so quiet and efficient the only regret you will have is why you didn't buy it sooner.

video:video.video:title: BOSCI SHP88PZ55N01 Dish Washer
video:video.video:description: Let's take a look at the BOSCHSHP88PZ55N01 Dish Washer truly a revolutionary piece of equipment for your kitchen.

video:video.video:title: Joe Bidden App allows access to millons, Google mistakenly says adults can be monitored without their notice
video:video.video:description: Technology is great but some think they can develop for less and get more trouble then they bargained for.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Tech Talk Show FB Say they will pay people to deactive their account during the eletion
video:video.video:description: We will talk about what FB is promising to do and businesses are starting to pull out because of their behavior. Apple retaliates by counter suing Fortnite.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Tech Talk Show 2020E11: Amazon and Drone Deliverys, Schools Reopening, Tesla Self Driving Cars and More...
video:video.video:description: In this episode we talk about some great things to name a few 1) Franklin Lakes Indian Hill District setting the balls in motion for reopening 2) Tesla Self Driving Cars 3) Amazon getting OK for Drone Delivery testing to businesses only 4) What is a Jerk according to Merriam-webster 5) New Galaxy Flip Phone 6) COVID Much More.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Tech Talk Show
video:video.video:description: Most consumers fight back here is a manufacturer Tesla fighting back. Districts still don't have a handle on schools and how to open properly. Apple's new iPhone design is leaks along with Air-power that was supposedly going to be discontinued.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Tech Talk Show E9, FB, Uber, Lyft, Visas and more
video:video.video:description: Working overseas, are they giving out visas? Uber and Lyft may be in for much more than hot water than just CA Panasonic Work from home areas.

video:video.video:title: Schools use Tech to Track COVID with a bracelet that monitors their temperature
video:video.video:description: Learn how schools are relying on new technology to track students attending school as they partially open for a few days a week Fortnite sues Apple and Google.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Tech Talk Show Gadgets News Trends
video:video.video:description: The power outage we had showed that many were not prepared for this and much more on this episode.

video:video.video:title: Flying Cars, HBO, Identity, Shredding,Youtube Changes
video:video.video:description: In this episode we will learn how to protect your identity, talk about the new resolution allowing a flying car and much more.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Bonsaii S330 Shredder Unboxing
video:video.video:description: In this video I will give you my review of the Bonsaii 3S30 Shredder.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Lenovo Thinkcentre M070Q Unboxing
video:video.video:description: In this video I will unbox the Lenovo Thinkcentre M070Q

video:video.video:title: JMOR Lenovo P330 Unboxing
video:video.video:description: Yes, powerful workstations can come in size slightly bigger than hand and support for several monitors to operate simultaneously.

video:video.video:title: COVID 19 Technology being used to help peopl get by during the pandemic
video:video.video:description: On this episode will talk about different technology that is being deployed to allow people to get by during this pandemic. Ranging from Contact-less-payment, robot-deliver, schools and much more

video:video.video:title: Unboxing of Bonsaii CS30 Cross Cut Shredder
video:video.video:description: Everyone needs a shredder to ensure that their personal information on document don't wind up in the wrong hands.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Tech Talk Show: Digital Dating, Space Launch, Robot Jobs, iPod Returns
video:video.video:description: In this episode will dive deep into Digital and Virtual Dating. Will also talk about the current space project scheduled to launch before the end of July 2020. Many are concerned are Robots really taking jobs away from people and which ones if so. A favorite gadget of the past may be returning to the world we all know the iPod.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Review of Dyson V7 Motor Head
video:video.video:description: After using the Dyson V7 Motor Head for a few days

video:video.video:title: JMOR Unboxing of Dyson v7 Motor Head
video:video.video:description: Let's look at the Dyson V7 and what comes in the box.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Tech Talk Show 2020 E3
video:video.video:description: What is Roblox doing and how is Disney going to balance a safe COVID19 Free Park and parent's confidence.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Tech Talk Show 2020 E2
video:video.video:description: On this episode we will talk about Tik Tock copying user data and why Microsoft Stores are closing.

video:video.video:title: JMOR Tech Talk Show 2020 E1
video:video.video:description: This the show where we talk about all types of gadgets and technology from things you can fit in your pocket, things you need to carry, things you have installed to things you drive.
